source: Drafted from extracted Codebook_V3.0.xlsx and limesurvey_survey_581821 (12).lss metadata only; no participant values used.
notes: DRAFT ONLY: requires manual review and approval before production use.
Draft for T1/T2/T3 real-study exports; review before production use.

Default analysis output keeps only analysis_allowlist variables; all identifiers, contact/operational fields, metadata, free text, quasi-identifiers, and unreviewed sensitive variables are dropped by default.
